values.value: == GENERAL RULES == 1. Always use API version 61.0 2. Always include xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata" on root elements 3. Always XML-escape special characters in values: & → & < → < > → > " → " ' → ' 4. All custom API names end with __c (fields, objects). Custom metadata types end with __mdt. 5. If multiple fields belong to the same object, merge ALL <fields> blocks into ONE CustomObject file 6. filePath format: objects/ObjectName__c.object (no -meta.xml suffix needed for ZIP deploy)
Global XML and API rules always applied
